data.description:

This transaction reduced Venus Concept’s total debt by 24%, enhancing its financial position and supporting its strategic initiatives for long-term growth and profitability. The exchange agreement also involved amendments to existing loan agreements, providing additional financial flexibility and extending loan maturity dates.

data.title: Groovy Company Rebrands to OTCM Protocol, Moves HQ
data.description:
Groovy Company ( (GROO) ) has provided an update.

On September 25, 2025, Groovy Company moved its headquarters to Fairfield, NJ, and announced a corporate rebranding to OTCM Protocol, marking its strategic pivot into blockchain technology for OTC securities trading. The company appointed a new executive leadership team to lead this transformation, including Berge Abajian as CEO, Patrick Mokros as COO, and Frank Yglesias as CTO. The new platform aims to tokenize OTC stocks, creating permanent liquid markets and addressing a $50 billion market opportunity, while maintaining regulatory compliance through its proprietary ‘Howey Shield’ framework.

More about Groovy Company

OTCM Protocol, Inc., formerly Groovy Company, Inc., is a Wyoming corporation focused on developing a blockchain-based platform for tokenizing Over-the-Counter (OTC) securities. The company aims to create liquid markets for traditionally illiquid stocks by converting them into digital assets on the Solana blockchain, addressing a significant market inefficiency affecting over 15,000 OTC companies and millions of shareholders.

data.title: Snow Lake Resources Reports Encouraging Results from Pine Ridge Uranium Project
data.description:
Snow Lake Resources ( (LITM) ) has shared an update.

On October 2, 2025, Snow Lake Resources Ltd. announced the completion of 15 additional drill holes at its Pine Ridge Uranium Project in Wyoming, a joint venture with Global Uranium and Enrichment Limited. The results, which include significant intercepts of uranium mineralization, continue to demonstrate the project’s strong development potential. The drilling program, which aims to complete 125 holes by November 2025, has confirmed the existence of two major sandstone units suitable for future in-situ recovery development. The project is strategically positioned in a premier U.S. uranium basin, benefiting from rising uranium prices and supportive U.S. energy policies.

More about Snow Lake Resources

Snow Lake Resources Ltd., operating as Snow Lake Energy, is a Canadian company focused on the nuclear fuel cycle and critical minerals. It is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol LITM. The company has a portfolio of uranium projects in the United States, including the Pine Ridge Uranium project in Wyoming, and interests in next-generation uranium enrichment and advanced reactor technology.
